raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Ta̅s Erichkû-Mahtes
Laũkâ weddahß/ un atstahj ta-
wus Behrnus/ tapehz ka Sah-
les newaid.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Un tee Mescha-Ehseti stahw
angstås Weetåß/ un twarsta to
Wehju/ ka tee Puhki/ winnu
Azzis pamtrst/ tapehz ka Sah-
les ne irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Jepshu ak KUNGS!
mubfu Noseegumi prett mums
Leezibu dohd/ tomehr palihds ta-
wa Wahrda deht/ jo mubfas
Atkahpschanas irr leelas/ prett
tewi eſam mehs grehkojſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Ak Israëta Zerriba! wix-
na Pestifchana Behdu Laikâ/
tapehz gribbi tu ka Swetcht-
neeks buht eekſch Senmes? jeb
ka Zelta-Wihrs/ kas kurra Wee-
tå nahk/ un par Nakti paleek?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Rapehz gribbi tu buht ka
kahds baiſigs Wihrs/ ka weens
Warrenajs/ kas ne warr tspe-
ſtiht? Tu jo eſt ak KUNGS!
mubfu Widdû/ un mehs eſam
pehz tawa Wahrda nofaukti/ ne
atftahjees no mums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Ta fakka tas KUNGS
no ſcheem Lândim: Tee eeinihto
chury un turp ſkraidibt/ un ne
eewalda ſawas Rahjas/ tapehz
ne irr tam KUNGAM labs
Prahts pee teem; Nu wiꞥſch
peemiunnehs winno Noseegumu/
un peemeklehs winno Grehkus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Un tas KUNGS ſazzija
uhs manni: Ne tuhds preeftch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Jepshu tee gawe/ tatschu
eß winno Brehfschanu ne klauti-
schu/ un jepshu tee Dedsamo-
Uppurus/ un Ehdamo-Uppurus
uppure/ tad man tomehr ne buhs
labs Prahts pee teem. Bet zaur
Sohbinu/ un zaur Baddu/ un
zaur Mehri gribbu es tohs ap-
riht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Tad ſazzijues: Ak Klungs
KUNGS! Rangi/ tee Prawee-
schi fakka uhs teem: Juhs ne re-
dsefeet Sohbinu/ un Bads jums
ne nahkfees/ bet es dohschu juhs
ihstenn Meern ſchinri Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Un tas KUNGS ſazzija
uhs manni: Tee Praweeschi flud-
dina nepateefi eekſch manna
Wahrda/ es ne eſmu tehs fuh-
tijs/ nedß teem Pawehleschanu
dewis/ nedß uhs teem runnajs.
Tee fluddina jums nepateefu Pa-
rahdischanu / un Sibleschanu /
un Elkadeewibu/ un fanu paſchu
Sirđs Wiltibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Tapehz fakka tas KUNGS
ta pabr teem Praweescheem/ kas
mannā Wahrda fluddina/ kur
es tohs ne eſmu fuhtijs/ un tee
tomehr fakka: Sohbins nebubs/
nedß Bads ſchinni Senmē/ tee
Praweeschi taps paſchi zaur
Sohbinu un zaur Baddu ap-
rihti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Un tee Lândis/ uhs ko tee
fluddina/ taps us Jeruſalemes
Eelabni atnesit ta Badda un
Sohbina deht/ un neweens buhs/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
